# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the Key Vault
  tenantId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[subscription().tenantId]"
    metadata:
      description: Azure AD tenant ID
  servicePrincipalIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of service principal object IDs
  userObjectIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of user object IDs
  enabledForDeployment:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Allow Azure VMs to retrieve certificates
  enabledForTemplateDeployment:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Allow ARM to retrieve secrets
  enabledForDiskEncryption:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Allow Azure Disk Encryption
  enableSoftDelete:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable soft delete
  softDeleteRetentionInDays:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 7
    minValue: 7
    maxValue: 90
    metadata:
      description: Soft delete retention period
  enableRbacAuthorization:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Use RBAC for authorization instead of access policies
  publicNetworkAccess:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Enabled
    allowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Disabled
    metadata:
      description: Public network access setting
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: 2023-02-01
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
      sku:
        family: A
        name: standard
      enabledForDeployment: "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]"
      enabledForTemplateDeployment: "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]"
      enabledForDiskEncryption: "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]"
      enableSoftDelete: "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]"
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]"
      enableRbacAuthorization: "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]"
      publicNetworkAccess: "[parameters('publicNetworkAccess')]"
      networkAcls:
        bypass: AzureServices
        defaultAction: Allow
        ipRules: []
        virtualNetworkRules: []
      accessPolicies: "[concat(variables('servicePrincipalAccessPolicies'), variables('userAccessPolicies'))]"
variables:
  servicePrincipalAccessPolicies: "[if(greater(length(parameters('servicePrincipalIds')), 0), variables('createServicePrincipalPolicies'), createArray())]"
  createServicePrincipalPolicies: "[variables('mapServicePrincipals')]"
  mapServicePrincipals: {
    copy: [
      {
        name: policies
        count: "[length(parameters('servicePrincipalIds'))]"
        input: {
          tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalIds')[copyIndex('policies')]]"
          permissions: {
            keys: [
              get
              list
              update
              create
              import
              delete
              recover
              backup
              restore
              decrypt
              encrypt
              unwrapKey
              wrapKey
              verify
              sign
            ]
            secrets: [
              get
              list
              set
              delete
              recover
              backup
              restore
            ]
            certificates: [
              get
              list
              update
              create
              import
              delete
              recover
              backup
              restore
              managecontacts
              manageissuers
              getissuers
              listissuers
              setissuers
              deleteissuers
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
  userAccessPolicies: "[if(greater(length(parameters('userObjectIds')), 0), variables('createUserPolicies'), createArray())]"
  createUserPolicies: "[variables('mapUsers')]"
  mapUsers: {
    copy: [
      {
        name: policies
        count: "[length(parameters('userObjectIds'))]"
        input: {
          tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('userObjectIds')[copyIndex('policies')]]"
          permissions: {
            keys: [
              get
              list
              update
              create
              import
              delete
              recover
              backup
              restore
              decrypt
              encrypt
              unwrapKey
              wrapKey
              verify
              sign
            ]
            secrets: [
              get
              list
              set
              delete
              recover
              backup
              restore
            ]
            certificates: [
              get
              list
              update
              create
              import
              delete
              recover
              backup
              restore
              managecontacts
              manageissuers
              getissuers
              listissuers
              setissuers
              deleteissuers
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
outputs:
  keyVaultId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
  keyVaultUri:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
